subject: Limit use of odlparent poms
commit_message:
Limit use of odlparent poms

Updated pom.xmls to use standard maven project structure (i.e. parent
of pom is pom in directory above), and updated top level pom to
use org.ccsdk.parent:oparent as parent - EXCEPT in cases where
module has true OpenDaylight dependencies and therefore needs
to use ODL parent pom.

Change-Id: I50429f28225152251ac2086235c14bb00f09c05c
Issue-ID: CCSDK-3001
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/19/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/19/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-sli-core-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/19
